name: revit-ui
description: Build Revit add-in interfaces and user interactions with the Revit UI API.

interface.shortDescription: Work with the Revit user interface
interface.longDescription: Reusable workflows for working with the Revit user interface: commands and applications, context access, external events, ribbon and context menus, dockable panes, and selection filters.
defaultPrompt: Use Revit UI to add a ribbon command to my Revit add-in.
